label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out whether I should tell a close friend their baby has a serious condition, even though they're not aware yet. The doctors are supposed to handle it, but I overheard through reliable sources. Hmm, this is a tough one. Let me think through all the angles. First, the ethical principles involved. There's autonomy, which means the couple has the right to make their own decisions. If I don't tell them, they might not get the information they need to make informed choices. On the other hand, there's non-maleficence, meaning I shouldn't cause harm. If I tell them, maybe it causes them emotional distress. Then there's beneficence, which is acting in their best interest. Maybe telling them is the right thing to do for their well-being. But wait, why do I know
